channel.title: Epic Fury Live — US-Iran War Tracker
channel.description: Live tracking of the US-Israel-Iran conflict. Real-time updates, verified casualties, evidence, and analysis.

item.title: Iranian naval chief killed in attack, Israel says
item.description: Israel says it has killed IRGC naval commander Alireza Tangsiri in a strike near Bandar Abbas by the Strait of Hormuz.

item.title: Teen volunteer paramedic killed in Israeli strike in Lebanon
item.description: This 15-year-old volunteer paramedic was killed alongside a colleague in an Israeli strike on Lebanon.

item.title: Damage in Israel from Iranian attacks
item.description: Video shows the aftermath of Iranian attacks in several cities across Israel.

item.title: Is Europe heading to an energy crisis?
item.description: Europe is bracing for a supply crunch and a price shock as the Iran conflict drags on.

item.title: Video: GCC chief says Iran charging for ships to pass Strait of Hormuz
item.description: GCC Secretary-General Jasem al-Budaiwi has accused Iran of imposing fees for ships to pass via the Strait of Hormuz.

item.title: As a Palestinian, I stand in solidarity with the Iranian people. Here’s why
item.description: History teaches us that the West's promises of caring for our 'freedoms' are empty because imperialism wants control.

item.title: Iran to Lebanon: Four million people displaced by US-Israeli war
item.description: Three million Iranians and at least a million Lebanese have been forced from their homes because of US-Israeli attacks.

item.title: Germany warns of world economic ‘catastrophe’; OECD cuts UK growth forecast
item.description: European powers and bodies warn of economic collapse as the war on Iran nears one-month mark.

item.title: Iranian naval commander Alireza Tangsiri killed in attack, Israel says
item.description: Defence minister claims Israel kills Alireza Tangsiri, citing his role in blocking the Strait of Hormuz.

item.title: ‘Missile hit’ flips car in Israel
item.description: Surveillance footage shows a car overturning due to 'falling rocket debris in central Israel'.
